metadata.coverage: 836 246 709 new files (29 TB) incrementally crawled between 03 March 2020 and 04 May 2020 mainly from .PT domain and web sites crawled during the previous crawl.
metadata.creator: Portuguese Web Archive
metadata.description: Thirty two collection AWP. Without Deduplicator.
metadata.notes: All the items of the AWP32 crawl are identified by the custom field pwacrawlid:AWP32. The AWP32 crawl is complete because it was performed with using without DeDuplicator.
metadata.subject: Complete crawl of the Portuguese web; Portuguese Web Archive; Portuguese online publications; pwacrawlid:AWP32; 2020
metadata.title: The Thirty two crawl of the Portuguese web (incremental), performed in 2020 (AWP32).
